{{Quote|But much like the diversionary raids at Gyndine and Duro that preceded the clash at Ebaq Nine.|[[Nas Choka]]|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''</ref>}}
As part of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar's]] plan to season the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force's]] new recruits and wear down the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Traest Kre'fey]] launched a '''raid''' on the world of [[Duro/Legends|Duro]], captured nearly two years earlier. The Yuuzhan Vong, augmented by the [[Ylesian Republic]], had three cruisers in the system, being outnumbered three to one by Admiral Kre'fey's fleet of nine. After jamming the planetary [[yammosk]], Kre'fey sent in the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] commanded squadrons first. Once they had destroyed or crippled the Yuuzhan Vong cruisers, the fleet positioned itself in orbit, and proceeded to [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|orbitally bombard]] Duro, attacking any [[Warrior caste|Warrior]] [[grashal]]s, [[Shaper caste|Shaper]] [[damutek]]s, and starports housing the enemy. At this point, seven additional Yuuzhan Vong capital ships arrived. Kre'fey, however, decided to play it safe, and ordered the fleet to withdraw to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].
